family_rationale: This is the final unprocessed non-sims refined-fuel source in folder order after the transport-contract batch.
The document is a compact archive classification ledger, so it stays bounded as a single-doc source-map batch.

Its dominant value is the source-local split among canon, legacy, noncanon notes, invalid residue, and deterministic-readiness claims, while its dominant risk is overreading those labels as active runtime authority.
No active A2 surfaces were mutated.
possible_downstream_consequence_policy: possible downstream consequence only; preserve this as the archive-manifest ledger in which source-local canon, legacy, noncanon, invalid, and status labels can inform later comparisons but cannot self-promote into active kernel authority, A2 mutation permission, or deterministic-generation guarantees by default
notes: The dominant reuse value is the archive-time classification snapshot over the ladder family.
The dominant risk is over-trusting source-local canon, automation-safe, and deterministic claims as current runtime truth.
Assigned folder-order coverage for this root is now exhausted.
